meanings.definition: graphic art consisting of an artistic composition made by applying paints to a surface
examples: he bought the painting as an investment
his pictures hang in the Louvre
he studied painting and sculpture for many years

meanings.definition: the act of applying paint to a surface
examples: you can finish the job of painting faster with a roller than with a brush

meanings.definition: the occupation of a house painter
examples: house painting was the only craft he knew
he painted all day in the garden
He painted a painting of the garden

meanings.definition: apply paint to; coat with paint

examples: He painted his mistress many times

meanings.definition: apply a liquid to; e.g., paint the gutters with linseed oil
